title: Pudding’s Betrayal Is Revealed
description: On pages 15–15, this part focuses on Jinbe, Luffy, Nami as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I am not sure if this is

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well you see, I heard that you were captured.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But first... would you like to get out of there?

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 11 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
